shellCommands.command: pwd && rg --files -g '!node_modules' | head -80 && git status --short && cat package.json

find . -path './node_modules' -prune -o -type f -print | head -120; printf '
-- source references --
'; grep -RIn --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git -E 'touchstart|mouseenter|mouseover|resize|scroll|showDelay|delayShow|delegat' src tests 2>/dev/null | head -240; printf '
-- agents --
'; sed -n '1,220p' AGENTS.md 2>/dev/null

sed -n '1,230p' src/components/Tooltip/TooltipTypes.d.ts; sed -n '220,330p' src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx; sed -n '520,590p' src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx; sed -n '1,130p' src/components/Tooltip/event-delegation.ts; sed -n '1,240p' src/test/tooltip-anchor-selection.spec.js; sed -n '130,230p' src/test/tooltip-close-and-delay-behavior.spec.js; sed -n '70,145p' src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js

grep -RIn --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git -E '\btouch\b|touchstart|touchend|pointerdown' src README.md docs/docs | head -240; grep -RIn --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git 'clearTimeoutRef' src/utils src/components | head -100; sed -n '1,180p' src/utils/index.ts; grep -RIn --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git 'function debounce\|const debounce\|export.*debounce' src

sed -n '1,230p' src/components/TooltipController/TooltipController.tsx; sed -n '1,230p' src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx; sed -n '390,430p' src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx; sed -n '1,100p' src/utils/clear-timeout-ref.ts; sed -n '1,100p' src/utils/debounce.ts; git log --oneline -8 -- src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx src/components/Tooltip/TooltipTypes.d.ts
git remote -v; git branch -a; git log --all --oneline --decorate -20; grep -RIn --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git -E 'openEvents|AnchorOpenEvents|touch' README.md docs src | head -260

git grep -n -i touch $(git rev-list --all) -- src/components/Tooltip src/components/TooltipController 2>/dev/null | head -100; git show 58511a9^:src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx | sed -n '1,420p' | tail -180; git show 58511a9:src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx | sed -n '285,390p'

git remote -v; grep -RIn --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git -E 'touch|Touch|openEvents' CHANGELOG.md docs/versioned_docs/version-6.x docs 2>/dev/null | head -180; grep -RIn --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git 'useTooltipEvents' src/test src | head -40

sed -n '405,475p' src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx; sed -n '620,680p' src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx; sed -n '1,90p' src/test/test-utils.js 2>/dev/null || true; grep -RIn --exclude-dir=node_modules 'fireEvent.touch\|TouchEvent\|touchStart' src/test | head -60
